title: Sign in and land on the dashboard
description: Verifies an operator can sign in with valid credentials and reaches the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Start a new test run with live output
description: This test verifies a user can start a test run from a template for selected devices and see live output while the run is in progress.

steps.description: Start creating a new test run using a template
Select one or more target devices
Verify a live output stream is displayed for the running test

title: View completed test run results and findings
description: This test verifies a user can open a completed test run and see summarized results with parsed findings.

steps.description: Select a completed test run from the list

title: Discover devices via IP range scan and add one to inventory
description: This test verifies a user can run an IP range discovery scan, review discovered devices with open ports, and add a selected device to inventory.

steps.description: Start a discovery scan for an IP range
Fill a valid IP range into the IP range field
Wait for discovered devices to populate
Select a discovered device from the results
Add the selected discovered device to inventory
Verify the selected device is shown as added to inventory

title: View dashboard overview content
description: Verifies a signed-in operator can view summary counts and recent activity with trend charts on the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify summary counts for devices, projects, and recent test runs are displayed
Verify trend charts for device history are displayed

title: Create a new project
description: This test verifies an operator can create a project with required metadata and the new project appears in the projects list.

steps.description: Fill Project name with Project Alpha
Fill valid project metadata in the available metadata fields
Verify the new project appears in the projects list

title: Add a device to inventory
description: Verifies an operator can add a new device with valid details and the device appears in the inventory list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open device inventory
Fill Device-UI-Automation-01 into the device name field
Fill a valid IP address into the IP address field
Verify the new device is listed in the device inventory

title: Assign devices to a project
description: This test verifies a user can assign devices to a project and the assigned devices are listed under the project.

steps.description: Fill Project name with Project Devices
Assign one or more available devices to the project
Verify assigned devices are displayed under the project

title: Open a device detail view
description: Verifies an operator can open an existing device from inventory and see its fingerprint and history sections.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open device inventory
Fill Device-UI-Automation-Detail-01 into the device name field
Fill a valid IP address into the IP address field
Select the newly created device from the device list
Verify device fingerprint information is displayed
Verify device history information is displayed

title: View discovered device open ports and services from scan results
description: This test verifies a user can open a discovered device from scan results and view its open ports and service details.

steps.description: Start a discovery scan for an IP range
Fill a valid IP range into the IP range field
Wait for discovered devices to populate
Open a discovered device details view from the results
Verify open ports and service details are displayed

title: Keep run creation blocked until required selections are made
description: This test verifies the user cannot start a new test run until required inputs like template and target devices are selected.

steps.description: Start creating a new test run
Attempt to start the run without selecting required fields
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Create a device profile
description: Verifies an operator can create a device profile and the profile appears in the profile list.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open device profiles
Start the create device profile flow
Fill Profile-UI-Automation-01 into the profile name field
Fill a valid description into the profile description field
Verify the new device profile is listed

title: Filter dashboard trends by time range
description: Verifies a signed-in operator can apply a time range filter and the dashboard trends and activity update accordingly.

steps.description: Select a valid time range in the dashboard time range filter
Verify the trend charts and recent activity reflect the selected time range

title: Validate IP range input for discovery scan
description: This test verifies the user cannot start a discovery scan with an invalid IP range and an input validation error is shown.

steps.description: Start a discovery scan for an IP range
Fill 999.999.999.999/99 into the IP range field
Verify an IP range validation error is visible

title: Prevent saving a project without a name
description: This test verifies the user cannot create a project without a required name and a validation error is shown.

steps.description: Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Reject invalid credentials on login
description: Verifies a user cannot sign in with an incorrect password and sees a credentials validation error.

steps.description: Fill invalid-password into the password field
Verify a credentials validation error is visible
